title: teams — authorization policies
description: Four policies, one per owned model. Each policy composes the ResolveScope middleware's decision: a caller with scope 'branch:X' can only see/act on teams inside branch X. A caller with scope 'coach:Y' (Wave 3 scope key) can only see/act on teams they coach. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the permission check, then layers scope narrowing.

abilities.scope: member: teams they belong to (active TeamMember row); coach: teams they coach; branch_manager+: all in scoped branches
narrows to caller's active branch scope when set
branch_manager narrowed to their scoped branches
coach: only teams they coach; branch_manager+: their scoped branches
admin + owner only
child-safety-audit-critical when team.min_age < 18 OR max_age < 18
audit-critical: every fire notifies the tenant admin and writes an audit row with retention 7 years

member: their own roster rows only (WHERE (member_type='user' AND member_id = auth()->id()) OR (member_type='athlete' AND member.guardian_user_id = auth()->id())); coach: rosters of teams they coach; branch_manager+: everything in scoped branches
member: same as viewAny; admins: team_members.view-all
coach: only for teams they coach; branch_manager+: their scoped branches
same as create
admin + owner only; must be a terminal roster row
restricted to branch_manager+ — disciplinary decisions
coach: only trials for teams they coach; branch_manager+: all in scoped branches
coach: same as viewAny; trialists themselves can see their own trials via trials.view-own (Wave 3 addition; not shipped here)
requires team_trials entitlement
must be the team's coach OR have trials.evaluate-any
same as evaluate — decision authority
same as evaluate; decision_notes required per observer
restricted to admin + owner — anonymous trialist PII
member: participations of teams they belong to; coach: teams they coach; branch_manager+: all in scoped branches
requires team_event_participation entitlement
coach + branch_manager+ only — competitively sensitive data
